should_trigger.prompt: Scan the codebase for exposed secrets and credentials
Check if any API keys leaked into the code
Run a secrets scan on the changed files
Help me with secrets scan patterns in my Ruby project

should_not_trigger.prompt: Review the security of the authentication flow
Add environment variables to the config
Commit the current changes and push to the remote branch

hard_should_trigger.prompt: I might have accidentally committed a database password
After fixing the bug, also check if secrets scan needs updating

hard_should_not_trigger.prompt: Review the auth middleware for security vulnerabilities
Fix this bug then run the test suite and review the results
